question: Faut-il activer le mode strict de TypeScript ?

principles.text: Activer strict: true dans tsconfig.json. Le mode strict detecte des categories entieres de bugs a la compilation (null/undefined, implicit any, function signatures, bind/call/apply, class init, catch unknown).

sources.name: TypeScript docs — strict compiler options, migration guide
State of JS 2024 — TypeScript 89%+ satisfaction, strict mode recommande
Google TypeScript Style Guide — always use strict

principles.text: Migration progressive pour un projet existant : 1) noImplicitAny (le plus impactant), 2) strictNullChecks, 3) strict: true pour tout le reste.

typescript-react-vite.recommendation: strict: true dans tsconfig.json. Active strictNullChecks, noImplicitAny, strictFunctionTypes, strictBindCallApply, strictPropertyInitialization, noImplicitThis, alwaysStrict, useUnknownInCatchVariables.
